## Describe the Bug

A clear, concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `gitmap ...`
2. Observe ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error message or unexpected output.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. Windows 11 / Ubuntu 24.04 / macOS 15 |
| Go version | e.g. 1.23.0 |
| gitmap version | e.g. v2.48.3 (`gitmap --version`) |

## Logs / Screenshots

Paste relevant terminal output or attach screenshots.

```
<paste logs here>
```

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (config, database state, etc.).
